title: Carlton Nanomax Pro Ti Badminton Set, 2 Player Set with Rackets, Carry Cover & Shuttles
features: PROFESSIONAL SET: Complete 2-player badminton kit featuring Carlton Nanomax Pro Ti rackets and a protective cover for storage and transport
TITANIUM CONSTRUCTION: Premium titanium-enhanced frame design provides excellent durability while maintaining optimal weight balance
PERFORMANCE FEATURES: High-tension string bed delivers enhanced power and control for competitive gameplay
RACKET SPECIFICATIONS: Lightweight yet sturdy construction allows for quick maneuverability and precise shot placement
CARRYING CONVENIENCE: Includes a durable red carrying case with Carlton branding for easy transportation and racket protection
description: Elevate your badminton game with the Carlton Nanomax Pro Ti 2 Player Badminton Set. This comprehensive kit includes two professional-grade rackets featuring titanium-enhanced frames for exceptional durability and power. The rackets deliver excellent control and manoeuvrability on the court, while their balanced weight distribution helps reduce player fatigue during extended matches. The set comes complete with a stylish red protective cover to safely store and transport your equipment. The rackets' string tension and frame construction are optimised for both recreational players and those seeking to improve their competitive edge. Whether you're playing casual matches or training for tournaments, this Carlton set provides the quality and performance you need. The included carrying case features the distinctive Carlton branding and offers convenient storage compartments to keep your badminton gear organised and protected.
